---
title: "Homework 12"
format: html
---


Q1
```{python}
import json
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go

gap = px.data.gapminder().query("continent == 'Europe' & year == 1997")

gap.head()

fig1= px.choropleth(
    gap,
    locations="iso_alpha",      
    color="gdpPercap",         
    hover_name="country", 
    hover_data={
        "gdpPercap":":,.0f",  
        "pop":":,",
        "iso_alpha":False},    
    color_continuous_scale="Viridis",
    scope="europe",
    title= "European populations and GDP",
    projection="orthographic")

fig1.show()

### I added the projection arguement and it squished and distorted europe.

```

Q2
```{python}
gap2 = px.data.gapminder().query("year == 1992")

fig2 = px.scatter_geo(
    gap2,
    locations="iso_alpha",  
    color="continent",      
    size="pop",                
    hover_name="country",      
    hover_data=["pop", "lifeExp"], 
    title="World Population and Life Expectancy (1992)",
    opacity=0.1
)

fig2.show()

### Using opacity, I changed the opacity of the bubbles, 1 makes it solid where 0.1 is very transparent
```
